name: Extract ISDA master agreement terms and log to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
## 📈 ISDA Master Agreement Digitizer

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for ISDA documents
2. Extracts netting provisions and credit support terms
3. Pulls close-out mechanics and governing law
4. Extracts CSA terms and threshold amounts
5. Logs all terms to Google Sheets
6. Sends Slack alert with agreement summary

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Drive folder for ISDA documents
3. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   Counterparty | Agreement Date | Governing Law | Netting Type | Credit Support | Threshold | MTA | Close-out | Cross Default | Processed Date
4. Update the folder ID and sheet ID in the nodes
5. Connect your Slack workspace

### Perfect for
- Derivatives trading desks
- Financial institutions
- Risk management teams

parameters.prompt: Extract ISDA Master Agreement data as flat fields. agreementDate (YYYY-MM-DD), agreementVersion (e.g. 1992 or 2002), partyAName, partyARole, partyBName, partyBRole, governingLaw, nettingApplies (true/false), nettingScope, creditSupportType, thresholdAmount (number), minimumTransferAmount (number), eventsOfDefaultList (semicolon-separated events of default), terminationEventsList (semicolon-separated termination events), crossDefaultApplies (true/false), crossDefaultThreshold (number), closeOutNettingMethod, earlyTerminationMethod, amendmentsList (semicolon-separated key schedule amendments), specifiedEntitiesList (semicolon-separated specified entities), electiveTerminationRights (true/false), autoEarlyTermination (true/false), riskRating (one of: Low, Medium, High, Critical), keyRisksList (semicolon-separated key risks).

parameters.jsCode:
const data = ($input.first().json?.data || $input.first().json) || {};
const fileName = $('New ISDA Document').item.json.name;
const fileId   = $('New ISDA Document').item.json.id;

const parties = [data.partyAName, data.partyBName].filter(Boolean).join(' / ') || 'N/A';
const eods = (data.eventsOfDefaultList || '').split(';').filter(Boolean);
const terms = (data.terminationEventsList || '').split(';').filter(Boolean);
const risks = (data.keyRisksList || '').split(';').filter(Boolean);

return [{ json: {
  agreementDate:    data.agreementDate    || 'N/A',
  agreementVersion: data.agreementVersion || 'N/A',
  partyAName:       data.partyAName       || 'N/A',
  partyBName:       data.partyBName       || 'N/A',
  parties,
  governingLaw:     data.governingLaw     || 'N/A',
  nettingApplies:   data.nettingApplies   || false,
  creditSupportType: data.creditSupportType || 'N/A',
  crossDefaultApplies: data.crossDefaultApplies || false,
  crossDefaultThreshold: data.crossDefaultThreshold || 0,
  eventsOfDefaultList:   data.eventsOfDefaultList   || 'N/A',
  terminationEventsList: data.terminationEventsList || 'N/A',
  eodCount:  eods.length,
  termCount: terms.length,
  amendmentsList: data.amendmentsList || 'None',
  riskRating: data.riskRating || 'Medium',
  keyRisksList: data.keyRisksList || 'None',
  riskCount: risks.length,
  autoEarlyTermination: data.autoEarlyTermination || false,
  fileName, fileId,
  processedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  documentType:         'ISDA Master Agreement',
  closeOutNetting:      data.nettingApplies ? 'Yes' : 'No',
  closeOutMethod:       data.closeOutNettingMethod || 'N/A',
  nettingType:          data.nettingScope          || 'N/A',
  paymentNetting:       data.nettingApplies ? 'Yes' : 'No',
  setOffRights:         'Per Schedule',
  creditSupportDoc:     data.creditSupportType || 'None',
  eligibleCollateral:   'Per CSA',
  thresholdPartyA:      parseFloat(data.thresholdAmount) || 0,
  thresholdPartyB:      parseFloat(data.thresholdAmount) || 0,
  minimumTransferAmount: parseFloat(data.minimumTransferAmount) || 0,
  crossDefaultApplicable: data.crossDefaultApplies ? 'Yes' : 'No',
  partyALei:            'N/A',
  partyBLei:            'N/A',
  partyAJurisdiction:   data.governingLaw || 'N/A',
  partyBJurisdiction:   data.governingLaw || 'N/A',
  fileId:               fileId,

}}];
